title: Hash Tables, Dictionaries, Sets, and Collision Policy
description: Create a deduplication and lookup service that remains correct under collision-heavy data. Learners cumulatively produce a hash-table model and workload benchmark through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Relate hash stability, equality, and immutable key requirements.
Trace separate chaining and open addressing through collision and deletion cases.
Explain how load factor and resizing influence expected cost and memory.
